description.en: The fish swam in the lake.
description.tp: kala li tawa lon telo suli.
pipi li wile moku e telo.
mi awen lon poka pi telo suli.

description.en: The eagle is king of birds.
description.tp: waso wawa li lawa e waso ali.
jan Ton li tawa ike tawa telo.

description.en: The fish swam in the lake.
description.tp: kala li tawa lon telo suli.
pipi jaki li tawa lon kon.
jan Ton li open e poki.

description.en: The night is dark and cold.
description.tp: tenpo pimeja li pimeja li lete.

npcs.personality: cold-natured wanderer and master of the snow village; tests challengers with his ice team.
quiet elder who sits by the houses and watches the snow.

text.en: The night is dark and cold.
text.tp: tenpo pimeja li pimeja li lete.

npcs.personality: plant-keeper who tends cold-hardy herbs inside the fenced garden.

text.en: The night is dark and cold.
text.tp: tenpo pimeja li pimeja li lete.

text.en: The night is dark and cold.
text.tp: tenpo pimeja li pimeja li lete.

description.tp: mi awen lon poka pi telo suli.

npcs.personality: a fisher sitting at the lake's edge, quietly distressed; lost something precious in the water and hopes the player will hear him out.
the lake village's master; imposing but fair. Stands at the south plaza blocking the path to the deeper route until her trial is cleared.
runs a lakeside stall selling dried fish. Unhurried, content, fond of repeating herself.

text.tp: jan Ton li esun e kala.
jan seme li alasa e kala ni?

text.en: The fish swam in the lake.
text.tp: kala li tawa lon telo suli.
mi awen lon poka pi telo suli.
jan Ton li esun e kala.
mi awen lon poka pi telo suli.

npcs.personality: elder mentor; warm, unhurried; hands the player their first poki and lets them pick a starter.
an old friend, quietly sad; a callback to the hungry-friend beat.
leans on the well, ruminating about water.

text.tp: o wile jo e ijo wan.

npcs.personality: a veteran fisher who has walked this riverside path for decades. No badge to give — just offers a tough fight for experience and a chance to test your skills.

text.en: I like to fish in the river.
text.tp: mi alasa e kala lon nasin telo. ni li pona tawa mi.

npcs.personality: a kid with a small net, sitting by the riverbank watching the water. Not a trainer — just a cheerful bystander.

text.tp: jan seme li alasa e kala ni?

npcs.personality: a friendly merchant selling grilled river fish from a small cart. Always in a good mood, smells like smoke.

text.tp: jan Ton li pana esun e kala.

npcs.personality: a contemplative person sitting at the river's edge, watching the current drift by. Speaks quietly and loves the sound of water.

text.en: I like to fish in the river.
text.tp: mi alasa e kala lon nasin telo. ni li pona tawa mi.
jan Ton li tawa lon telo tawa.
jan seme li alasa e kala ni?
jan Ton li pana esun e kala.

npcs.personality: cocky rival — took a starter too; wants to prove he's stronger.
stoic mountain guardian; terse, austere. Blocks the path north until beaten. Teaches sewi on victory.
a hiker caught off-guard by the cold; pauses along the path to catch breath.

text.en: There's snow on the mountain top.
text.tp: ko lete li lon sewi nena.

description.en: The mountain is covered in snow.

npcs.personality: stoic gym master of the great peak; weathered and wordless. Teaches suli on victory.
a monk meditating on the peak; offers a quiet word about the wind.

text.en: Tom sat alone on a rock.
text.tp: jan Ton li awen taso lon kiwen.

npcs.personality: a lost traveler unsure of the path; asks for directions down.

text.en: Tom sat alone on a rock.
text.tp: jan Ton li awen taso lon kiwen.
mi kama wile e nasin ante.

main_spine.summary: Player chooses their starter from jan Sewi.
jan Ike challenges the player at the end of the route.
Clear jan Telo's gym at the next village.
